name: wiki-server
description: Local desktop agent server for an LLM-maintained wiki
author: Wiki Server Contributors

scripts.test: node --test tray/system/auto-launch.test.cjs tray/server/codex-command.test.cjs tray/server/port-selection.test.cjs tray/server/integration-guide.test.cjs tray/wiki-repository.test.cjs tray/wiki/git-remote.test.cjs tray/wiki/wiki-installation.test.cjs tray/wiki/wiki-workspace.test.cjs desktop/desktop.test.cjs && tsx --test src/architecture.test.ts src/retrieval/wikiRetrieval.test.ts src/retrieval/wikiRetrievalCommand.test.ts src/runners/agentRunner.test.ts src/runners/codexAppServerRunner.test.ts src/runners/codexAppServerProtocol.test.ts src/runners/codexExecRunner.test.ts src/runners/codexVersion.test.ts src/http/clientHtml.test.ts src/http/wikiHttpServer.test.ts src/jobs/jobCommand.test.ts src/jobs/retrievalMetrics.test.ts src/config/wikiServerConfig.test.ts src/http/serverStartup.test.ts src/jobs/jobStore.test.ts
scripts.app:pack: npm run build && npm run prepare:wiki-seed && electron-builder --dir
scripts.app:dist: npm run build && npm run prepare:wiki-seed && electron-builder --win nsis
